package rulecoverage

func PositiveFileHandleWithoutClose() string {
    ruleID := "file_handle_without_close"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "File handles opened via os.Open, os.Create, or os.OpenFile without an observed Close() path."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
